text: Very nice, kind and professional. Would recommend 100%.

translations.sr: Veoma ljubazni, fini i profesionalni. Preporučio bih 100%.
translations.sr_cyrl: Веома љубазни, фини и професионални. Препоручио бих 100%.
translations.en: Very nice, kind and professional. Would recommend 100%.
translations.ru: Очень приятные, добрые и профессиональные. Рекомендую на 100%.
translations.de: Sehr nett, freundlich und professionell. Würde zu 100% empfehlen.
translations.tr: Çok hoş, nazik ve profesyonel. %100 tavsiye ederim.
